# BRD-02 — Production Readiness Checklist

| Docker daemon | Running | — | `docker info` exits 0 |
| Docker Compose (standalone) | v5.0.2 | v5.0.2 | `docker-compose --version` |

| npm | 11.7.0 | 11.7.0 | `npm --version` |

| Service | Endpoint | Required | Verified |

| Check | Required | Verified |

**Gate:** All pre-flight items must pass before implementation begins. BRD-01 app shell confirmed live on :3001 and :5173 ✓.

---

## Build-Time — Dependency Constraints

### No External Message Broker (ADR-02-004 / NFR-02-015)

| Check | Required | Status | Verified |
|-------|----------|--------|----------|
| No NATS, Kafka, RabbitMQ in `go.mod` | Zero broker client libraries | PASS | `grep -E "nats\|kafka\|amqp\|rabbitmq" go.mod` returns empty |
| No broker services in `docker-compose.yml` | No broker services defined | **NOTE** | `docker-compose.yml` defines `redis` as cache/session store — **not a message broker**. Must remain a cache only, not promoted to a pub/sub or queue role |
| No broker connectivity required at startup | `GET /ready` returns 200 without broker connections | Must verify at implementation time | |

**Note:** Redis is used as a cache/service for non-broker purposes (session, rate limiting). This is acceptable per NFR-02-015 ("No dedicated message broker or distributed worker system"). Redis must not be used as a message queue, event bus, or job queue.

**Gate:** `go.mod` must not import broker libraries. Redis may exist as cache only.

---

## API Surface — OpenAPI Contract Compliance

All endpoints listed below must be implemented per `contracts/openapi.yaml` (schema version `0.2.0-brd02`).

| Endpoint Family | Operations | Verified |
|----------------|------------|----------|
| Project CRUD | Create, read, update, delete project | openapi.yaml path: `/projects/{projectId}` |
| Task CRUD with project scope | Create, read, update, delete tasks; scope enforced to project | openapi.yaml: OrchestrationTask schema |
| Dependency graph | Parent/child edge management, circular/cross-project rejection | openapi.yaml: `/projects/{projectId}/tasks/{taskId}/dependency` |
| Decomposition lifecycle | Propose, approve/reject, activate, idempotency (one active per parent) | openapi.yaml: `/projects/{projectId}/tasks/{taskId}/decomposition` |
| Gate CRUD and approval | Task-level gates, project-level phase gates, human approval required | openapi.yaml: `/projects/{projectId}/gates/*` |
| Board read API | Tasks grouped by execution status, with dependency/gate/stale/assignment state | openapi.yaml: board read endpoint |
| SSE event stream | `GET /projects/{projectId}/events/stream`, `Last-Event-ID` reconnect, `event`=topic, `id`=eventId | openapi.yaml: `streamProjectEvents` |
| Webhook registration | Register, list, update, delete webhook consumers | openapi.yaml: `/projects/{projectId}/webhooks/*` |
| Health endpoints | `GET /ready`, `GET /live` | openapi.yaml |

### OpenAPI Contract Verification Commands

```bash
# Verify webhook registration secret is required (ADR-02-003)
grep -A5 "WebhookRegistrationRequest:" contracts/openapi.yaml | grep "required:"

# Expected output: required: [url, events, secret]

# Verify no localhost-only CORS wildcard in SSE spec
grep -i "cors\|allow.*origin\|Access-Control" contracts/openapi.yaml
# Must NOT contain wildcard "*" for non-dev SSE endpoint
```

**Gate:** All endpoint families must exist in implementation. Test via OpenAPI schema validation.

---

## Security — Contract and Implementation Requirements

### Webhook Signing (ADR-02-003)

| Check | Requirement | Status |
|-------|-------------|--------|
| Webhook secret required in registration | `secret` is a **required** field in `WebhookRegistrationRequest` (openapi.yaml line 1478) | **VERIFIED** ✓ |
| `X-Webhook-Signature: HMAC-SHA256` header on all non-dev deliveries | Header name must be `X-Webhook-Signature`, value = `HMAC-SHA256(raw_body, secret_hash)` | **VERIFIED** (events.md line 528) |
| `localhost` / `127.0.0.1` dev exemption | Dev URLs exempt from signing requirement; rationale documented in brd.md line 117 | **VERIFIED** |
| Signing applied during implementation | Every outbound webhook delivery includes this header unless URL is localhost/127.0.0.1 | **IMPL-ACTION** |

**IMPL-ACTION** = checklist item for implementation verification, not pre-flight check.

### CORS for SSE Endpoint (ADR-02-006)

| Check | Requirement | Status |
|-------|-------------|--------|
| SSE `OPTIONS` preflight handler | Returns `Access-Control-Allow-Origin` validated against project allowlist | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| Default allowlist for dev | `["http://localhost", "http://127.0.0.1"]` for development | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| Wildcard `*` prohibited in non-dev | No wildcard in CORS policy for production | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| Per-project origin allowlist | SSE CORS is project-scoped, not global | **IMPL-ACTION** |

### Role Authorization (FR-02-012 through FR-02-014, ADR-02-005)

| Check | Requirement | Status |
|-------|-------------|--------|
| Actor identity + role claim on all mutations | `401 Unauthorized` for missing/null/empty actorId or unrecognized role | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| Role-action mapping enforced | `403 Forbidden` for role-action mismatches | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| Layer A boundaries | May NOT approve project-level phase gates without explicit human delegation | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| Layer B boundaries | May ONLY update assigned tasks; may NOT approve own gates, approve project gates, or override limits | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| `system` role restricts | Infrastructure-only; allowed actions: emit audit events, emit feature-flag-change events only | **IMPL-ACTION** (ADR-02-005) |

### Authorization Audit (NFR-02-014)

| Check | Requirement | Status |
|-------|-------------|--------|
| `auth.mutation.denied` event on every auth failure | Both 401 and 403 cases emit this event | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| Event envelope has full context | Includes `actorId`, `actorRole`, `attemptedAction`, `deniedReason` in payload | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| Audit append-only | Event appended before response returned; no update or delete of audit records | **IMPL-ACTION** (NFR-02-013) |

### Security Eval Coverage (`evals/security/brd-02-platform-orchestration-security.md`)

8 security test contracts defined covering role-scoped auth, Layer A/Layer B boundary enforcement, `auth.mutation.denied` event, unauthorized mutation fail-closed, webhook non-blocking, webhook failure isolation, audit append-only, and cross-project rejection.

**Gate:** Security eval must be implemented and passing. eval file exists ✓.

---

## Performance — Thresholds and Guarantees

**Source:** `evals/perf/brd-02-platform-orchestration-performance.md` (8 performance test contracts)

### Latency Thresholds

| NFR | Metric | p50 Threshold | p95 Threshold | Test |
|-----|--------|---------------|---------------|------|
| NFR-02-006 | Board read latency | < 300ms | < 500ms | Load test at 10,000 tasks |
| NFR-02-007 | Mutation latency | < 500ms | < 750ms | Sequential mutations, excluding async webhook |
| NFR-02-008 | SSE delivery latency | < 2s | < 3s | Event delivery to connected clients |
| NFR-02-009 | Webhook enqueue latency | < 1s | < 2s | Job appears in queue within threshold |

### Scale and Isolation

| NFR | Metric | Threshold | Status |
|-----|--------|-----------|--------|
| NFR-02-005 | SSE concurrent clients | 50 max; 51st → 503/429 | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| NFR-02-010 | Webhook failure isolation | Committed state never rolled back | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| NFR-02-012 | Read availability during webhook outage | Board reads + SSE unaffected | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| NFR-02-015 | No broker dependency | Zero external broker at runtime | **VERIFIED** (go.mod ✓, docker-compose redis-as-cache ✓) |

### Performance Eval Coverage

8 performance test contracts covering board read latency, mutation latency, SSE delivery, webhook enqueue, SSE concurrent scale, operational simplicity (no broker), webhook failure isolation, and read availability during outage.

**Gate:** Performance eval must be implemented and passing. eval file exists ✓.

## Observability — Event Envelope and Metrics

### Event Envelope (ADR-02-001 / FR-02-022A)

| Check | Requirement | Status |
|-------|-------------|--------|
| Canonical 11-field envelope | `eventId`, `schemaVersion`, `projectId`, `topic`, `actorId`, `actorRole`, `taskId`, `parentTaskId`, `gateId`, `timestamp`, `payload` | **VERIFIED** (brd.md line 99, events.md) |
| Schema version `v1alpha` | All events carry `schemaVersion: "v1alpha"` during Phase 1/2 | **VERIFIED** (ADR-02-001) |
| Envelope+payload pattern | Every event topic has a defined `payload` shape | **VERIFIED** (events.md) |
| Envelope schema versioning policy | Breaking changes trigger version bump, documented migration guide | **IMPL-ACTION** (ADR-02-001) |

### Metrics Emitted (brd.md line 165)

These metrics must be implemented with no sensitive content:

| Metric | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `orch_project_created_total` | counter | Projects created |
| `orch_task_created_total` | counter | Tasks created |
| `orch_task_status_changed_total` | counter | Status transitions |
| `orch_task_completed_total` | counter | Tasks completed |
| `orch_task_blocked_total` | counter | Tasks blocked |
| `orch_task_cancelled_total` | counter | Tasks cancelled |
| `orch_task_stale_total` | counter | Stale detections |
| `orch_task_stale_current` | gauge | Current stale tasks |
| `orch_task_cycle_time_ms` | histogram | Cycle time |
| `orch_gate_opened_total` | counter | Gates opened |
| `orch_gate_approved_total` | counter | Gates approved |
| `orch_gate_rejected_total` | counter | Gates rejected |
| `orch_gate_wait_duration_ms` | histogram | Time gate open |
| `orch_decomposition_proposed_total` | counter | Decompositions proposed |
| `orch_decomposition_approved_total` | counter | Decompositions approved |
| `orch_decomposition_rejected_total` | counter | Decompositions rejected |
| `orch_decomposition_review_duration_ms` | histogram | Decomposition review time |
| `orch_decomposition_activation_duration_ms` | histogram | Proposal to active time |
| `orch_children_per_decomposition` | histogram | Children per proposal |
| `orch_handoff_submitted_total` | counter | Handoffs submitted |
| `orch_api_request_duration_ms` | histogram | API latency by route |
| `orch_db_operation_duration_ms` | histogram | DB operation latency |
| `orch_sse_clients_current` | gauge | SSE client count |
| `orch_sse_delivery_duration_ms` | histogram | SSE delivery latency |
| `orch_webhook_enqueued_total` | counter | Webhooks enqueued |
| `orch_webhook_delivery_succeeded_total` | counter | Successful deliveries |
| `orch_webhook_delivery_failed_total` | counter | Failed deliveries |
| `orch_webhook_retry_total` | counter | Retry attempts |

**No sensitive content** (actor tokens, webhook secrets, full request bodies, PII) must appear in metric labels or values.

### `/ready` Degradation Semantics (ADR-02-004)

| Check | Requirement | Status |
|-------|---------------|--------|
| `GET /ready` returns 200 only when all subsystems up | Storage, current-state, audit persistence, webhook queue all available | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| `GET /ready` returns 503 with failing subsystem | Body identifies `storage`, `currentState`, `auditPersistence`, or `webhookQueue` | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| Webhook receiver outage does NOT cause 503 | Only queue unavailability (not delivery) triggers 503 | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| `GET /live` returns 200 when process is running | Independent of subsystem health | **IMPL-ACTION** |

---

## Rollback — Recovery Procedures

| Scenario | Rollback Action | Trigger |
|----------|-----------------|---------|
| Webhook signing broken | Revert webhook delivery code; re-register consumers without secret requirement | ADR-02-003 |
| SSE CORS misconfigured | Revert CORS middleware; restrict SSE to same-origin temporarily | ADR-02-006 |
| Transaction atomicity broken | Immediate DB transaction review; diagnostic query on `/ready` surfaces drift | ADR-02-002 |
| `platform-orchestration` flag broken | Set flag to `false`; all orchestration endpoints return 403 or hide capability | FR-02-028 |
| DB schema migration failure | `docker-compose down`; revert migration; `docker-compose up -d` | — |
| Event envelope schema change | Version bump; `v1alpha` signals pre-stability; migration guide required | ADR-02-001 |

### Rollback Verification Commands

```bash
# Flag disable — all orchestration endpoints hidden
curl -H "X-Feature-Flag: platform-orchestration=false" http://localhost:3001/projects/...

# Expected: 403 or capability hidden

# Transaction atomicity — no drift between current-state and audit
curl http://localhost:3001/ready
# Should return 200; if 503, diagnostic body identifies failing subsystem
```

---

## Feature Flag Registration

| Flag | Default | Master Gate | Scope | Status |
|------|---------|-------------|-------|--------|
| `platform-orchestration` | `false` | Yes — all orchestration capabilities | Master gate for BRD-02 | **VERIFIED** in `specs/feature-flags.md` line 33 ✓ |
| `layer-a-agents` | `false` | No | Layer A agent decomposition/routing | **VERIFIED** in `specs/feature-flags.md` line 32 ✓ |
| `layer-b-agents` | `false` | No | Layer B task updates and handoff | **VERIFIED** in `specs/feature-flags.md` line 32 ✓ |
| `human-gates` | `false` | No | Human approval for gates | **VERIFIED** in `specs/feature-flags.md` line 32 ✓ |
| `audit-trail` | `false` | No | Immutable audit event persistence | **VERIFIED** in `specs/feature-flags.md` line 32 ✓ |
| `kanban-orchestrator` | `false` | Legacy | Compatibility from Phase 0 — do not use for new features | **VERIFIED** in `specs/feature-flags.md` line 32 ✓ |

**Note:** `platform-orchestration=false` must hide ALL project/task/gate/orchestration endpoints. `kanban-orchestrator` is legacy — new code must use `platform-orchestration` only (FR-02-029).

---

## Transaction Atomicity (ADR-02-002)

| Check | Requirement | Status |
|-------|-------------|--------|
| State mutation + audit event commit in one DB transaction | Must be atomic or consistently ordered | **IMPL-ACTION** |
| `/ready` diagnostic consistency check | Background health probe detects drift between current-state and audit log | **IMPL-ACTION** (ADR-02-002) |
| Rollback on partial commit | If engine supports row-level transactions — one commit or full rollback | **IMPL-ACTION** |

---

## Implementation Handoff Constraints Summary

These constraints are **non-negotiable** during implementation:

| Constraint | Source | Requirement |
|------------|--------|-------------|
| `platform-orchestration` master flag gates all BRD-02 surface | FR-02-028 | All orchestration endpoints gated by flag |
| Use `platform-orchestration`, not `kanban-orchestrator` | FR-02-029 | New code uses master flag only |
| Webhook signing mandatory except localhost dev | ADR-02-003 | `X-Webhook-Signature: HMAC-SHA256` header on all non-dev webhooks |
| SSE requires CORS preflight | ADR-02-006 | OPTIONS handler required; per-project origin allowlist |
| `system` role infrastructure-only | ADR-02-005 | May only emit audit and feature-flag-change events |
| Atomic state + audit commit | ADR-02-002 | One DB transaction for mutation + audit append |
| `/ready` returns 503 with failing subsystem | ADR-02-004 | Webhook queue in readiness check; receiver outages do NOT cause 503 |
| Event schema `v1alpha` | ADR-02-001 | All events carry `schemaVersion: "v1alpha"` during Phase 1/2 |
| No dedicated message broker | NFR-02-015 | In-process or DB-backed queue; no NATS/Kafka/RabbitMQ |
| Board read < 300ms p50 at 10k tasks | NFR-02-006 | DB indexes on `project_id`, `execution_status`, `parent_task_id` |
| Mutation < 500ms p50 excluding async webhook | NFR-02-007 | Synchronous commit path must be fast |
| SSE delivery within 2s | NFR-02-008 | Fanout must not be blocked by slow webhook delivery |
| No Phase 2 dependencies in Phase 1 scope | brd.md | All 7 deferred items must not be assumed by implementation |

---

## Pre-Implementation Verification Commands

Run these before any BRD-02 source code is written:

```bash
# 1. Toolchain
go version          # expect go1.25.6
node --version      # expect v25.3.0
pnpm --version      # expect 10.32.1
docker-compose --version  # expect v5.0.2

# 2. BRD-01 app shell
curl http://localhost:3001/health   # expect 200
curl http://localhost:5173        # expect 200

# 3. No broker in go.mod
grep -E "nats|kafka|amqp|rabbitmq" go.mod go.mod.sum
# expect: empty / no matches

# 4. platform-orchestration flag registered
grep "platform-orchestration" specs/feature-flags.md
# expect: flag row with description

# 5. Webhook secret required in OpenAPI
grep -A2 "required: \[url, events, secret\]" contracts/openapi.yaml
# expect: required: [url, events, secret]

# 6. X-Webhook-Signature in events.md
grep "X-Webhook-Signature" contracts/events.md
# expect: X-Webhook-Signature: <HMAC-SHA256(body, secret)>  [non-dev URLs always...
```
